nasb.text: Also men of Tyre were living there who imported fish and all kinds of merchandise, and sold them to the sons of Judah on the sabbath, even in Jerusalem.

esv.text: Tyrians also, who lived in the city, brought in fish and all kinds of goods and sold them on the Sabbath to the people of Judah, in Jerusalem itself!

cnv.text: 又有推羅人住在耶路撒冷城中，他們把魚和各樣的貨物運進來，在安息日賣給猶大人，而且在耶路撒冷販賣。

ccb.text: 一些住在耶路撒冷的泰尔人运来鱼和各样货物，在安息日卖给耶路撒冷的犹大人。
